title: Bloxy Skies
description: Adds a classic 2008 Roblox skybox! Mods required
body:
# Bloxy Skies

This pack adds the classic 2008 era roblox sky, and a bonus end sky

# Supported mods (required!):
### [Nuit (FabricSkyBoxes)](https://modrinth.com/mod/)
### [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify)
### [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)

## Gameplay screenshot

![Screenshot of sky in overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AXXutxyP/images/a3e5eb3eee5385df9126c01edfbf25074fd26250.png)
